executive_summary: Our research on social engineering, institutional surveillance dominance, and stablecoin scaling continues to drive thought leadership, while US sanctions on Iranian crypto exchanges and Bitcoin volatility dominated macro coverage. We're positioned as the authoritative voice on compliance escalation, threat attribution, and institutional-grade monitoring—areas where financial institutions are now outpacing exchanges.

narratives.title: Social Engineering & Crypto Security Escalation
narratives.description: 65% of crypto hacks now leverage social engineering; $17B lost. Deepfakes and romance scams dominate attack vectors targeting retail investors.
narratives.relevance: Our threat intelligence on social engineering tactics reinforces demand for our detection and attribution capabilities among institutions and platforms.

narratives.title: Institutional Surveillance Outpaces Exchange Vigilance
narratives.description: Financial institutions now monitor crypto transactions more aggressively than exchanges themselves. Compliance standards among institutions rising faster than platform defenses.
narratives.relevance: We validate institutional demand for transaction monitoring—a core strength driving enterprise adoption and positioning us as the TradFi-crypto bridge.

narratives.title: Stablecoin Infrastructure & Quadrillion-Dollar Payment Future
narratives.description: Stablecoins could process $1.5 quadrillion annually by 2035. Turkish lira and emerging-market tokens proliferating; dollar dominance cement via stablecoin rails.
narratives.relevance: Our stablecoin flow tracking and compliance analytics become critical infrastructure for regulators and institutions managing this scaled payment layer.

market_landscape.title: Bitcoin Volatility & Macro Headwinds
market_landscape.body: Bitcoin ETF outflows ($2.8B in longest streak) and six-week lows amid geopolitical tensions (Iran conflict, Middle East jitters) underscore macro fragility. Inflation-hedging thesis under pressure as traditional macro dominates price action.

market_landscape.title: TradFi-Crypto Regulatory Convergence
market_landscape.body: Binance stock/ETF trading, Coinbase rupee integration, and Vanguard ETF scaling signal TradFi is replicating crypto's playbook while regulators (CFTC undoing Gemini settlement) maintain enforcement intensity. Institutional adoption accelerating despite—or because of—tighter compliance baselines.

market_landscape.title: Stablecoins as Geopolitical Dollar Tool
market_landscape.body: Emerging-market stablecoin adoption (yen, Turkish lira, Indian rupee) and ECB concerns over dollar dominance reveal stablecoins as new-era FX rails. Regulatory arbitrage and Central Bank Digital Currency competition intensifying alongside illicit finance crackdowns.

competitor_reads.Arkham Intelligence: Positioning as real-time blockchain intelligence provider via high-profile transaction tracking (Mt. Gox moves, MicroStrategy sales); gaining traction on transparency and public attribution.
competitor_reads.Elliptic: Doubling down on institutional compliance infrastructure and DeFi governance models; partner expansion (Tapbit) signals scaling of enterprise compliance tooling.
competitor_reads.TRM Labs: Launching Mycroft (Solutions Architecture team bot)—likely positioning as AI-native compliance automation to compete on agent-driven detection and response.
